|   <head>
|     <script>
|       src="../../resources/dump-as-markup.js"
|     "
"
|   <body>
|     <object>
|       name="editor1"
|       type="application/x-xstandard"
|       "
"
|       <textarea>
|         name="editor1"
|         this.value=""
|         <shadow:root>
|           <div>
|             <br>
|               aria-hidden="true"
|               id="textarea-placeholder-break"
|       "
"
|       <shadow:root>
|         <slot>
|     "
"
